item.title: Magnetic Drinkware Charms Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Magnet Ingestion; Violate Mandatory Standard for Magnets; Sold on Amazon by Maitys
item.company: Online at Amazon.com from October 2022 through January 2026 for about $8.
item.brand: Online at Amazon.com from October 2022 through January 2026 for about $8.
item.summary: This recall involves Maitys' drinkware charms. The recalled magnetic charms were sold in sets of 400 multicolored charms with magnetic backings used to attach the charm to glass drinkware. "Maitys" is printed on the front of the charm's box.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Maitys Drinkware Charms.
item.remedy: Consumers should stop using the recalled drinkware charms immediately, take them away from children and contact Maitys for a full refund. Consumers will be asked to dispose of the charms and send a photo of the disposed product to maituus@outlook.com.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
